query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(?secretary) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793.
  ?secretary wdt:P31 wd:Q5.
  ?secretary wdt:P166 wd:Q765165.
  ?secretary wdt:P607 ?position.
  FILTER(?position < wd:Q765165)
}

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(?play) AS ?numberOfPlays) WHERE {
  ?play wdt:P31 wd:Q219828.
  ?play wdt:P580 ?date.
  ?date >= "1500-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime.
  ?date < "1600-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime.
  ?play wdt:P50 wd:Q692.
}
